data.title: Ecommerce earnings recap: What you missed from Lovesac and Tesco
data.description: Tesco reported double-digit growth in U.K. ecommerce sales as Lovesac addressed tariffs with its latest earnings results.

data.title: Southeast Asia ecommerce sellers struggle with AI adoption
data.description: Sellers believe they’ve integrated AI into 47% of their processes, highlighting a notable gap between perceived and actual adoption.

data.title: Fastenal boosts digital sales and adjusts sourcing for tariff impact
data.description: Alongside its digital push, Fastenal is preparing for new trade restrictions. The company has already begun raising prices in response to recent tariffs on Chinese steel and derivative products, including fasteners, and is readying for the possibility of a proposed 145% tariff on certain Chinese non-steel imports.

data.title: Roofr raises new funding to expand roofing software
data.description: The Series B funding follows Roofr’s earlier $23.5 million raise in October 2023, which was led by Vertical Venture Partners.

data.title: A past ecommerce CEO is charged with fraud over fake AI claims
data.description: The indictment accuses Albert Saniger of raising more than $40 million from venture capital firms based on false statements about Nate’s AI capabilities.
